title: Operational Performance Benchmarking with R
text: general objective air navigation services enable “… safe, efficient, orderly flow air traffic.” ICAO promotes use performance-based approach encourages stakeholder monitor benchmark services. purpose set (global) key performance indicators (KPI) established Global Air Navigation Plan. KPIs (variants ) actively used performance benchmarking community. package jointly developed Department Airspace Control (DECEA) und EUROCONTROL. Performance groups organisations committed harmonise use KPIs part bi-lateral multi-lateral/international work. ansperf package implements common KPIs supporting metrics R.
